outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility; positive total GEX (1.19B) stabilizes market. Position below gamma flip creates local dealer selling pressure until reclaimed.
outlook.summary: Spot (24570.75) sits below critical gamma flip at 24775. Dealers short gamma here, amplifying downside moves. Reverse smirk skew (0.85) signals bullish undercurrents despite elevated PCR (1.47). 0DTE max pain at 24700 creates magnetic pull. Weekly GEX slightly negative (-0.03B) adds intraday volatility potential. Break above 24775 flips dealer positioning to long gamma, accelerating upside toward 25000-25075 resistance cluster.
